/usr/bin/ar qc libaws-checksums.a "CMakeFiles/aws-checksums.dir/source/checksums.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-checksums.dir/source/crc32.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-checksums.dir/source/crc64.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-checksums.dir/source/crc64_sw.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-checksums.dir/source/crc_sw.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-checksums.dir/source/crc_util.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-checksums.dir/source/intel/asm/crc32c_sse42_asm.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-checksums.dir/source/intel/intrin/crc64nvme_avx512.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-checksums.dir/source/intel/intrin/crc32c_sse42_avx512.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-checksums.dir/source/intel/intrin/crc64nvme_clmul.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libaws-checksums.a
